name: DIGIT
notes: Scottish tech news site with a dedicated funding category and monthly deal roundup articles (e.g. 'DIGIT Deal Roundup | March 2026'). Found TileBio seed round, stampfree.ai raise, and STAC investments in this run. High signal-to-noise for Scottish tech VC deals. URL pattern: /digit-deal-roundup-MONTH-YEAR/ for roundups.

name: BusinessCloud — Scotland
notes: UK tech/business news site with good Scottish coverage. Found STAC £772k investment in Quantcore, Vuabl, and Airspection in this run. Worth adding as a supplementary search source.

name: Daily Business Group
notes: Scottish business news site covering deals and investments. Homepage and categories produced multiple Scottish VC deal leads including SWURF, EnteroBiotix, Esk in this run. Worth adding as a source with direct homepage scraping.

name: Campfire Scotland Newsletter
notes: Weekly Scottish startup newsletter covering deals, funding rounds, and ecosystem news. Found Cyacomb and GeneralPractice.AI deals in a 2025 edition. Substack-based — may require free subscription. Best effort as content may be paywalled.

name: Scottish Financial News
notes: Scottish business and finance news site. Produced the SWURF £200k growth round article (March 2026) covering Edinburgh startup deals. Distinct from scottishfinancialreview.com. Has a dedicated articles section. Note: homepage returned 403 for the fetcher — may need search path or RSS check.
